title: Aulomyrcia pubiflora
taxonomy: Aulomyrcia pubiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is a type of myrtle native to the tropical regions of South America, specifically in the countries of Brazil and Peru. This plant is classified within the genus Aulomyrcia, which belongs to the tribe Myrteae. The classification of Aulomyrcia pubiflora is further refined to the family level, where it is placed alongside other myrtle species. Within the Myrtaceae family, Aulomyrcia pubiflora is part of a larger group of flowering plants characterized by their fragrant leaves and showy flowers.
